{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lirial viewing lens
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A [[Lirial viewing lens]] is a milky white crystal disc used for scrying.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]]'s viewing lens is a translucent crystal the size of a dinner plate used to see people.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18">''City of Light'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Talos said, “I know you have one of those Lirial viewing lenses,” Leah's scrying lens dropped into her hand a moment later: a clear, milky white disc of crystal the size of a dinner plate.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
